Degen Token

$DEGEN is live on Binance Futures!

Degen - Meme with a Dream

DEGEN is a reward token for Farcaster users, born from meme culture. It uses a unique tipping system that empowers the community to reward quality content creators. It also powers the Degen chain, one of the pioneering L3s launched on Base, offering a platform for building and using Degen apps, often referred to as the “Las Vegas of blockchains.”

Crowdfunds

Use DegenPad to crowdfund your Degen project, whether it’s new or already running, through $DEGEN tips from the Farcaster community.

Gentleman Labs Team

We’re a dynamic duo who’ve come out of Acorns, Credit Suisse, and other top companies. Passionate about tech and innovation, we’re dedicated to creating something amazing for the Degen community.
